Ticket Applicants will be able to transfer Guests within their Ticketing Accounts. Transfer requests will be considered in accordance with the Ticket Transfer and Resale Policy, which will be made available in due course at FIFA.com/tickets closer to the tournament dates.

If you cannot use all the Tickets that you have purchased, you may submit these Tickets for Resale to another Fan via the Official Resale Platform which will be made available by FIFA in 2018 at FIFA.com/tickets closer to the tournament dates.

Ticket transfers and resales are restricted, and governed by FIFA, for reasons including:

(a) event security;

(b) consumer protection;

(c) avoidance of counterfeit tickets and

(d) protection of a fair pricing scheme.

More information relating to Ticket Transfer and Resale for the 2018 FIFA World Cup Russia™ will be available in due course, and closer to the tournament dates.

replies.msg:
根返上次係1次過扣

我係第1round買 tst3 eng

中左波飛等fifa confirm email就要即刻即fanid先

要證件相upload比佢， 我直接upload美國visa冇問題， 申請到寄黎香港要大約1個半月

早申請會快d處理

另外confirm email會有個ticket confirm number

當你申請左fan id, 等一兩日會有個fanid number比你

咁就可以去下邊條link book免費火車

https://tickets.transport2018.com/free-train/schedule

免費ge 係 class 2 4人房
上下格床， 1次過book 雙人會限你上下格

分開book就可以 2個人都上 / 下格

留意返 火車大部分都係過夜車 ,
有d回程班次係 睇完波即晚走， 所以睇清楚時間先book, plan好唔洗咁趕

我自己係睇3場英撚 所以 有兩場 車程 係要成18至22個鐘
book小晚酒店

依家酒店機票已經升哂價
各位請盡快book

我用booking.com 9成都係唔洗比錢住 同free cancel

盡量搵d 1千蚊樓下1晚

moscow地鐵多 遠小小都唔緊要
的士app都有 平過香港的士 不過聽聞塞車係塞到仆街

的士app 可以搵 Gett同 Y.taxi
2個都要俄佬電話申請

今次抽唔到莫斯科場四強
而家得聖彼德堡場四強同決賽
